creator: chess@chessgriffin.com
text:
I can confirm this builds on my tinderbox with 6-STABLE, 7-STABLE, and
8-CURRENT and runs fine on my 7-RELEASE box.  My only suggested change
would be to remove PORTREVISION since this is a first time update to
0.6.1.

Please consider committing this update.

Thanks!

--
